title: palicourea ucayalina
intro: Palicourea ucayalina is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the "yerba de la montaña" or "mountain herb." The leaves of this plant are rich in flavonoids and other compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are beneficial for medicinal purposes. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, Palicourea ucayalina is prepared as a tea or infusion, often mixed with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
